blog_title: Stop Using 180 GSM for Printing — Here's Proof
caption:
₹15 saved. 300 pieces rejected. 😬

A printing unit chose 180 GSM for DTF work. Fabric looked thin through the print—entire batch gone. 180 GSM is daily wear. For printing? Start at 200 GSM minimum. 220 GSM for premium work.

The cost gap: ₹8 + ₹7 = ₹15. That ₹15 saving cost him ₹3+ lakhs in waste.

Save this if you're sourcing blanks for your next order 👇
